description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: From the homepage sessions area, save a beginner-level morning session lasting 15–25 minutes to your favorites.

tasks.instruction: From the pricing page, start checkout with the lowest-priced monthly subscription that includes offline downloads and costs under $25 per month, filling in the sign-up form and choosing credit card payment.

tasks.instruction: Use the routine builder to create a weekly routine with 3 beginner- or intermediate-level gentle sessions between 10–20 minutes, including one around 15 minutes, one tagged for evening, and one tagged for desk breaks.

tasks.instruction: On the homepage newsletter form, subscribe with the provided email by selecting exactly three topics covering stress relief, better sleep, and low-impact fitness, choosing 2–3 emails per week, morning (6–9 am) delivery, and content-only (no product update) preferences.

tasks.instruction: From the instructor directory, follow the instructor who teaches mindful movement or restorative yoga, has a rating of at least 4.6, and the most years of experience, then preview one of their beginner-level classes.

tasks.instruction: In the blog/resources section, save two anxiety-related and one sleep-related articles published within the last 30 days to your reading list, then open the reading list page.

target_names: 3 Micro-Resets for Anxiety You Can Do Anywhere
Evening Body Scan to Ease Anxiety Before Bed

tasks.instruction: Use the 5-question stress check-in on the homepage, answering for a high stress level, mostly tense body, gentle mat-based stretching for about 15 minutes in a quiet home environment, then view and save the suggested movement plan.

tasks.instruction: In the reminder planner demo, set up reminders on 4 days per week (Monday, Wednesday, Friday, and Sunday) at 7:30 AM, 12:15 PM, and 9:00 PM with in-app notifications only, then preview the schedule.

tasks.instruction: In the workplace or corporate wellness section, submit an inquiry for a company of 200–300 employees with a start date 30 days from today, a monthly budget around $4000, priorities focused on burnout, focus, and movement breaks, and email as the only contact method.
